hero.name: Gonzalo Lobos
hero.title: Business Strategy, E-commerce & Web Development.
hero.subtitle: I turn strategies into digital experiences that drive growth.

about.title: About Me
about.imageAlt: Portrait of Gonzalo Lobos, E-commerce and Web Development Specialist
about.introduction: I am a professional who is passionate about connecting business and technology. Applying my experience leading e-commerce initiatives for global brands, I focus on creating memorable user experiences that drive conversion and foster loyalty.
about.skills: I connect analytics with development. I rely on Google Analytics 4, Search Console, and BrightEdge to guide strategy. My experience in front-end development (React, Tailwind CSS) then allows me to design prototypes and ensure precise technical implementation.
about.callToAction: I'm looking to connect with innovative teams to create exceptional digital products. If my profile resonates with you, let's talk.

items.title: 2V Express
items.description: Comprehensive development of corporate identity and digital ecosystem for a company specialized in surplus removal. The project ranged from strategic brand definition (branding) to the technical enablement of professional communication channels and a high-authority web platform, generating operational consistency at every touchpoint.
results: Creation of a complete visual identity (Logo and Style Guide)
Corporate digitalization: Configuration of emails, signatures, and communication tools
Optimized web development to project solidity in a low-turnover industrial sector

items.title: Claudia Gallardo
items.description: Portfolio development for an Art Director with an international trajectory. The project consisted of creating a high-impact digital showcase to organize a prominent filmography on platforms such as Netflix, HBO, and Prime Video. The architecture centered on a cinematographic aesthetic that projects the status of a Pedro Sienna Award winner.
results: Information architecture designed to highlight world-class productions
Minimalist and sophisticated interface that gives center stage to the visual work
Asset optimization for smooth loading of high-resolution galleries

items.title: Lobos Mini Excavators
items.description: Development of a high-performance digital infrastructure for the industrial sector. We transformed the online presence into a local lead generation machine, prioritizing loading speed on-site and a technical architecture that projects the brand's operational solidity.
results: Strategic conversion optimization for machinery rental
Ultra-fast interface (WPO) designed for use in low-signal conditions
Authority positioning in the Aconcagua Valley market

items.title: Gonzalo Lobos
items.description: Digital ecosystem design for a high-level personal brand. The project synthesizes a trajectory in organizational psychology with business management tools, creating a platform that balances humanism and technical robustness to attract corporate clients.
results: Unification of strategic narrative and visual style system
Web architecture optimized for personal authority positioning
Structure oriented towards capturing high-value B2B clients

items.title: Brkovic Law Firm
items.description: Development of a premium institutional web platform for a law firm with over 30 years of experience in high complexity and human rights. The ecosystem was designed under a clean and solemn architecture that organizes multiple specialized practice areas, balancing institutional seriousness with optimized conversion flows.
results: Modular architecture for indexing and breaking down complex areas (Justice, Human Rights, and Community Defense)
Strategic integration of immediate response channels and direct advisory via WhatsApp
Advanced performance optimization (WPO) through preloading of critical assets for friction-free navigation

items.title: OSCAR: Intelligent Commercial Agent
items.description: Design and development of an autonomous conversational agent and centralized API architecture. The project interconnects advanced Gemini 2.5 Flash language models with the official WhatsApp API (Meta) and Chatwoot, implementing a 'Single Source of Truth' model to synchronize the bot's and agency's website corporate knowledge in real time.
results: Automation of the sales funnel and lead qualification through ultra-synthetic responses oriented toward conversion (Cal.com)
Event-driven hybrid architecture with a 'Human-in-the-Loop' security system for automatic routing via tags
Exposure of protected API endpoints with CORS support for dynamic ecosystem data consumption on the frontend

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: A selection of my most recent achievements and projects.

items.title: Digital Campaign Management
items.problem: Need to execute multiple simultaneous campaigns on web and app to boost sales.
items.objective: Orchestrate over 30 annual campaigns, ensuring a consistent user experience.
actions: Planning and execution of the annual campaign calendar.
Coordination with design, development, and marketing teams.
results: Successful execution of campaigns, resulting in high annual sales volume.
Improvement in purchase frequency and interaction.

items.title: SEO Order Growth
items.problem: Identified a growth opportunity in the organic channel, which had an order share below the brand's potential.
items.objective: Increase visibility and sales share from the organic channel through a content and technical optimization strategy.
actions: Implementation of FAQ sections on product pages.
Use of structured data (Schema) for visibility.
results: Double-digit growth in sales from the organic channel.
Significant increase in the channel's order share within the sales mix.

items.title: Pickup Channel Optimization
items.problem: The "Boutique Pickup" service was inconsistent, not available in all stores, and generated confusion.
items.objective: Implement and standardize the "Boutique Pickup" service in 100% of stores to unify the experience.
actions: Service rollout to all boutiques nationwide.
Training of in-store teams on the new operational flow.
Optimization of communication channels for order monitoring.
Drafting and improvement of notification emails to ensure pickup.
results: Notable increase in the adoption of the pickup modality.

items.title: SEM Campaign Launch and Management
items.problem: Launch the Google Ads presence for a client to generate qualified traffic and initial conversions.
items.objective: Implement an SEM strategy from scratch, set up conversion tracking, and obtain initial results.
actions: Structuring of the account and ad groups in Google Ads.
results: The client's first conversion events were obtained.
Successful validation of the performance funnel.

responsibilities: Leadership and overall direction of Expansis Pro, a digital solutions company oriented toward strategic and operational business optimization.
Digital Strategy Design: Defining technological roadmaps for businesses looking to scale their online presence and maximize conversions.
Operational Consulting: Applying efficiency methodologies and excellence standards to digital processes, leveraging high-level operational experience.
Digital Project Management: End-to-end supervision of platform development, ensuring that architecture and layout align perfectly with client business goals.
Strategic Advisory: Providing personalized guidance on implementing digital tools to optimize management and drive business growth.

past.title: E-commerce Merchandising Specialist
responsibilities: Ensure operational excellence and correct local adaptation of the global e-commerce strategy for Nespresso.com, guaranteeing a frictionless checkout flow.
Successful orchestration and execution of over 30 high-demand annual commercial campaigns (Cyber Days, Black Friday, and HVC).
Implement UX/UI improvements on digital platforms, optimizing navigation and functionality for users.
detailedTasks: Checkout Optimization & Debugging: Auditing the sales funnel on Nespresso.cl combining GA4 and Glassbox to analyze live sessions, detect technical glitches, and fix critical conversion drops.
Tag & Pixel Validation: Continuous use of Google Tag Assistant to test and correctly implement measurement tags and website integrations, ensuring behavioral data integrity.
Technical SEO & Organic Performance: Monitoring indexing, site health, and keyword optimization using advanced tools such as Google Search Console (GSC) and BrightEdge.

Agile Campaign Coordination: Daily control and synchronization of requirements with design and inventory teams through Jira, Asana, and Trello to meet launch deadlines and high-volume email deployments (HVC / Reactivation).

past.title: Training Development Manager
responsibilities: Coordination of training in the health and education sectors.
Income and expense management.
Coordination of payments with institutions.
Managed event invitations through email marketing campaigns using Mailchimp.
detailedTasks: To mitigate friction in remote training coordination, I centralized interdepartmental communication by implementing tracking channels in Slack, increasing the team's response speed.
With the aim of maximizing attendance at institutional call-outs, I structured segmented databases and executed massive email marketing campaigns via Mailchimp, monitoring metrics like Open Rate.
Managed the operational control of financial flows, directly coordinating payment statuses with health and education entities to ensure program continuity.

past.title: Front-End Developer
responsibilities: Development and optimization of responsive websites and landing pages oriented toward conversion.
Translation of business requirements into information architectures, wireframes, and visual prototypes.
detailedTasks: WordPress Ecosystem & Builders: Construction, customization, and maintenance of self-managed sites using advanced builders like Divi and Elementor.
User Interface (UI) Design: Creation of high-fidelity mockups and user flows to ensure usability and visual consistency prior to technical layout.
Requirements Gathering: Direct meetings with end clients to define project scopes, sitemaps, and delivery deadlines.

past.title: Photography Technician
responsibilities: Assisted in digital production (photo and audiovisual) for major brands.
Coordinated teams and casting for projects.

past.title: Marketing Product Management
responsibilities: Managed subscription campaigns for La Tercera newspaper.
Coordinated design and layout teams for graphic materials.
Tracked budgets and managed supplier contracts.

items.title: Master's Degree, Organizational Psychology
responsibilities: Study of human behavior in corporate environments, applying psychology to the strategic alignment of the business.
Development of leadership competencies, operational structure design, and optimization of collaborative workflows.
detailedTasks: Consumer Behavior: Deep understanding of cognitive biases, decision-making, and user archetypes, applied directly to the design of user experience (UX/UI) flows and digital conversion.
Change Management & Digital Adoption: Diagnosis and intervention in digital transformation processes, facilitating the integration of new interdepartmental technological tools.
Work Cell Dynamics: Specialization in high-performance collaboration frameworks to seamlessly coordinate multidisciplinary design and development teams.

items.title: Business Administration, Major in Business Management
responsibilities: Strategic training in financial management, formulation of sustainable business models, and market positioning strategies.
Specialization in operations management and direction of commercial scalability projects.
detailedTasks: Commercial Strategy & Funnel: Design of positioning plans and optimization of the digital sales funnel under constant analysis of financial metrics.
Finance & P&L Control: Management of corporate budgets, project evaluation, profitability analysis, and reconciliation of income and expense flows.
Operational Process Optimization: Application of efficiency methodologies and logistics structuring to standardize traditional and omnichannel sales channels.

items.title: Technician, Advertising Photography
responsibilities: Technical specialization in corporate image design, art direction, advanced lighting schemes, and visual advertising composition.
Management of digital production projects and aesthetic quality control for major commercial brands.
detailedTasks: Post-Production & Digital Workflow: Advanced digital image processing, color correction, and photocomcomposition using professional software such as Photoshop, Lightroom, and Capture One.
Art Direction & UI Aesthetics: Practical application of visual balance, spatial hierarchy, contrast, and color theory concepts, with direct transfer to web interface design.
Digital Asset Optimization: Format management, technical image compression, and preparation of high-fidelity digital assets optimized for smooth web loading performance (WPO).

items.title: Self-Taught Specialization in Full-Stack Web Development
responsibilities: Intensive study focused on the architecture, construction, and deployment of modern, responsive web applications.
Hands-on development of real-world projects to master advanced programming logic and professional workflows.
detailedTasks: Frontend Development with React: Building dynamic user interfaces, designing reusable components, and managing complex states using React Hooks.
Backend Architecture & APIs: Implementation of robust servers and microservices with Node.js and Express.js, integrating routing logic and API consumption under REST standards.
Advanced Layout & Styling: Mastery of semantic markup and modern structuring using HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox, and Grid to ensure a seamless multi-device experience.
Version Control & Logic: Professional management of repositories and version control using Git and GitHub, along with deepening logic skills in modern JavaScript (ES6+).

skills.title: Toolbox
skills.strategyDesc: My vision for impacting business goals.
skills.technicalDesc: Languages I use to build and prototype.

strategy.title: E-commerce Strategy
strategy.description: Roadmap definition, P&L management, and leadership of high-impact campaigns (Cyber Day, Black Friday).

strategy.title: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
strategy.description: Sales funnel analysis, A/B testing (Optimizely), and continuous improvement of user experience (UX/UI).

strategy.title: Digital Marketing & SEO
strategy.description: Organic positioning strategies, SEM, and marketing automation for customer loyalty (CRM).

strategy.title: Digital Project Management
strategy.description: Coordination of multidisciplinary teams for the execution of technological and commercial projects.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: If you are interested in collaborating or have any questions, feel free to contact me. I am always interested in hearing about new and compelling challenges.
